subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art compassionate in the name of God, His door of forgiveness is opened wide and He bestoweth bounty and grace upon the world of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بامس مهربان یزدان در بخشایش گشوده و بر جهان آفرینش بذل و بخشش میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
